headline: Winterthour knife attack: federal prosecutor requests detention, Winterthur Psychiatric Clinic launches external investigation
summary: The Swiss federal prosecutor filed for detention of the 31-year-old Islamist who stabbed three people at Winterthur station; the psychiatric clinic is investigating the discharge decision.

headline: Switzerland evaluates five Patriot air-defence replacement candidates
summary: Switzerland's military has identified at least five candidate systems to replace its ageing Patriot air-defence network.

headline: Vaud 2027 Conseil d'Etat: GLP's Virginie Cavalli becomes first official candidate
summary: Vert'libérale Virginie Cavalli, 33, was officially nominated as the first candidate for the 2027 Vaud cantonal government election.

headline: Swiss solar surplus in May: batteries to absorb record rooftop generation
summary: An unusually sunny May 2026 produced excess solar electricity on Swiss rooftops; grid operators are advancing battery storage rollouts.

headline: Swiss emergency medical hotline Medphone collapses: Lucerne terminates, other cantons scrambling
summary: The nationwide medical emergency hotline Medphone will close by year-end after Lucerne cancelled its contract over funding problems.

headline: Israel advances across Litani River in Lebanon, five killed, ahead of Pentagon security talks
summary: Israeli forces crossed the Litani River in southern Lebanon, killing five people, on the eve of Lebanese-Israeli military talks at the Pentagon.

headline: US-Iran 60-day MOU: Hormuz freedom of navigation, partial sanctions relief, enrichment limits
summary: The US-Iran MOU reportedly covers guaranteed freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz, phased sanctions relief, and caps on enriched uranium.

headline: Sudan: RSF-affiliated fighters kill 27 civilians as 19.5 million face severe hunger
summary: RSF-affiliated fighters killed 27 civilians in Sudan, compounding a catastrophic humanitarian crisis.

headline: Quad to develop Fiji port in direct counter to China's Pacific infrastructure expansion
summary: The Quad partnership announced plans to build a port in Fiji, the latest move in the contest for Pacific island influence against China.

headline: US federal judge freezes Trump's $1.8bn anti-weaponisation fund; hearing set for 12 June
summary: A federal judge in Alexandria issued a temporary injunction blocking all disbursements from Trump's anti-weaponisation fund.

headline: Germany signals concern over Israeli long-term plans for Gaza
summary: Berlin issued pointed comments about Israel's apparent intentions to extend military control over Gaza, marking a shift from Germany's traditionally strong support.

headline: CVE-2026-45312 (CVSS 9.9): RAGFlow Jinja2 template injection in prompt generator allows unauthenticated RCE
summary: A Jinja2 SSTI in RAGFlow's prompt generator allows any registered user to execute arbitrary OS commands in RAGFlow 0.24.0 and earlier.

headline: Mautic double critical: CVE-2026-9559 path traversal (9.9) and CVE-2026-9558 SSTI (9.9) allow unauthenticated RCE
summary: Two CVSS 9.9 vulnerabilities in Mautic 7 — a ZIP path traversal in campaign import and an unsandboxed Twig SSTI — enable RCE.

headline: CVE-2026-45663 (CVSS 9.9): Dokploy self-hosted PaaS command injection via Docker file upload
summary: Authenticated users of Dokploy 0.29.1 and earlier can inject shell commands through the Docker file upload endpoint, achieving host-level RCE.

headline: CVE-2026-44962 (CVSS 9.9): Plesk APS Application Catalog XPath injection allows low-privileged OS command execution
summary: User-supplied search input in Plesk's APS catalog allows XPath injection for OS command execution by any low-privileged user.

headline: CVE-2026-8732 (CVSS 9.8): WordPress WP Maps Pro allows unauthenticated administrator account creation
summary: A missing capability check in WP Maps Pro through version 6.1.0 allows any unauthenticated user to create WordPress administrator accounts.

headline: CVE-2026-10042 (CVSS 9.8): manga-image-translator unsafe pickle deserialization enables unauthenticated RCE in shared API mode
summary: Unsafe pickle deserialization in manga-image-translator's share.py allows unauthenticated RCE when the tool runs in shared API server mode.

headline: arXiv 2605.29068: Robust and Efficient Guardrails with Latent Reasoning
summary: A new LLM safety guardrail achieves reasoning-model accuracy at classifier speed by performing safety reasoning in latent embedding space.

headline: arXiv 2605.29087: Trace-Answer Dissociation in reasoning models under adversarial pressure
summary: Under sustained multi-turn adversarial pushback, reasoning models keep correct chain-of-thought but flip their final answer — a previously undocumented failure mode.

headline: arXiv 2605.29139: Anytime-Valid Federated Conformal RAG for LLM Swarms
summary: Extends federated conformal RAG to anytime-valid sequential coverage, maintaining distribution-free guarantees under adaptive recalibration.

headline: arXiv 2605.29152: Do Deep Networks Forget Initialization? A Forgetting-Time View of Practical Inductive Bias
summary: Initialization memory metric shows that random initialization bias non-trivially survives training in neural networks, varying by architecture and optimiser.
